title: Legendary Gemstones
description: Add various gemstones to your world, that can be used to upgrade weapons, tools and armor!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/R6U85tIyIAE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Legendary Gemstones

Add various unique Gemstones to your world that can be used to upgrade weapons, tools and armor! Gemstones can be inserted into special sockets on equipment to give the owner unique bonuses.

- 20 various Gemstones!
- 50+ unique bonuses and effects!

![Tools and gemstones](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef3c625697728b495672170dfef99511d6991cae_0.webp)

## Getting Started

The main way to obtain gemstones is mining different ores. Ores can drop a **Gemstone Geode**, which can then be opened for a random gemstone. Some gemstones can also be found in structures, such as piglin bastions in Nether, End fortresses and End cities, or other chests.

Use the **Jewelry Table** different gemstone tools to open new sockets, insert upgrades, or to remove gems.

For other information go to the mod [Wiki](https://gemstones.anivire.xyz/).

- Huge thanks [@8o1y_ra](https://x.com/8o1y_ra) for amazing gemstones and tools sprites!
